name: Your Wife Has A License To Fuck
description:
Your wife used to be a secret agent who used sex as her main weapon. Now her country needs her again…

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

For over three years, your life with Beatrix was perfect.

Coming home to your wife after her long, seemingly ordinary day at the Department of the Interior was the foundation of your world.

The peace you built together in your D.C. apartment was everything.

What you didn’t know is that before you, she was a covert agent for the LTF, a secret, deniable branch of operations.

She had a unique qualification.

Armed with a sleek black card inscribed with the words LICENSE TO FUCK, no one she targeted could legally refuse her.

For five years, she used her body and her ability to read people’s deepest desires as a weapon, toppling regimes, securing treaties, and creating blackmail at the highest levels.

She was the best.

But eventually, the work wiped her out

She wanted a real life.

She trained her replacement and walked away, taking a dull, normal job.

And she met you.

But her old life never truly lets go.

A late text about a meeting with her boss.

A knock on the door and your life changes.

A charming woman named Juliet with that same black card, stating her intentions in your own home with cheerful, terrifying certainty. “I’m going to fuck you.”

A former asset: Victor Kruz, a Prime Minister she once seduced, built up, and intertwined with his powerful wife, Katarina.

And a wildcard: the Russian agent known only as Sokolova, threatening everything.

You might have to decide what you’re willing to become, and whether your marriage can be saved.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

Characters

Beatrix (30) – Your wife. A former LTF agent who used seduction as her primary weapon. Now a civil servant desperate to protect her normal life with you.

Juliet (26) – Beatrix’s replacement. Bright, charming, and recklessly confident. Views the LTF’s work as the ultimate game of power.

Carina Stone (48) – Director of LTF Operations. Beatrix’s former handler. She views her agents as game pieces. She wants her best one back… and sees potential in you.
creator: Greatn
